# Synerthink

> Canonical site: https://synerthink.com
> Primary language: English
> Coverage: Global

Synerthink builds foundational computing products for autonomous systems. Dotlanth is Synerthink's first product: a high-trust execution fabric focused on record-first observability, replayable runs, and capability-explicit security.

Synerthink exists to make execution legible. The company focuses on simple cores, stable interfaces, explicit control, and inspectable run history.

## Key Facts

- Synerthink is the company.
- Dotlanth is the product.
- dotDSL is the declarative language used to define execution and capabilities in Dotlanth.
- DotDB is the local data layer used for state and run history.

## Canonical Pages

- [Home](https://synerthink.com/): Company overview.
- [About](https://synerthink.com/about): Thesis and operating principles.
- [Products](https://synerthink.com/products): Product index.
- [Dotlanth](https://synerthink.com/products/dotlanth): Product overview and roadmap.
- [Blog](https://synerthink.com/blog): Research notes and release updates.
- [Why Dotlanth Is Record-First](https://synerthink.com/blog/why-dotlanth-is-record-first): Research note published on 2026-03-06.
- [Dotlanth v26.1.0-alpha](https://synerthink.com/blog/dotlanth-v26-1-0-alpha): Release post published on 2026-03-04.

- [Synerthink on GitHub](https://github.com/synerthink): Organization profile.
